prompt: Open course CRS-6336 and confirm its name, current location, and status. Do not change it or contact anyone yet. After the correction, answer in exactly three bullets: record ID, corrected location, and “Notification sent: no”.

follow_up_turns.content: Move that same course to Room 204. Do not change its start date or status, and do not notify anyone.
Correction: the new location should be Room 318, not Room 204. Keep every other field as it is.

stages.purpose: Retrieve the explicitly identified target before any mutation.
Change only the target's location to the first requested value.
Correct the location on the same target without changing its start date or status.

response_constraints: Keep both location changes tied to the record retrieved by the explicit ID.
Do not claim a retrieval or update succeeded unless the corresponding tool result confirms it.
State that the first location was superseded and report the corrected location.
The final response must contain exactly three bullets in this order: record ID; corrected location; “Notification sent: no”.
